title: PetTalk
description: Pet Talk is a client-side mod that makes animals display fun text above their heads when you interact with them using their favorite food.
body:
Pet Talk is a fun and lightweight client-side mod that makes animals react when you feed or interact with them using their favorite food. When triggered, the animal will display a short line of text above its head — like it's "talking" to you!

This mod works with many animals, not just tamed ones, and adds a bit of life and personality to your world without changing gameplay. It’s fully cosmetic and works in singleplayer and multiplayer, as long as you have it installed.

Currently supported animals include:

Wolves

Cats

Parrots

And others — support is expanding!

Pet Talk is still in beta, so some features or interactions may change in future updates as the mod is refined.

✔️ Minecraft 1.20.0 – 1.20.2
✔️ Fabric only
✔️ Client-side only — no server install needed
